ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party of the sponsor (e.g., R, D, I) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State represented by the sponsor */,
  "district" INTEGER /* District represented by the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cosponsors" (
  "cosponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cosponsor */,
  "legislation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legislation */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member cosponsoring the legislation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cosponsor_id")
)
column_names: Party of the sponsor (e.g., R, D, I)
ID of the member cosponsoring the legislation
